allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]; print\('Network:', list\(d['NetworkSettings']['Networks'].keys\(\)\)\); print\('IP:', [v['IPAddress'] for v in d['NetworkSettings']['Networks'].values\(\)]\)")
